_comment: Hybrid sprite manifest - maps IDs to external sprite sheet paths. HybridSpriteLoader reads from 'sheets' key.

bard.source: artist aseprite — Game graphics - Characters/BARD/Bard Base sprite.aseprite (idle 0-3, cast 4-7, attack 8-11; 2x nearest-neighbor upscale to 256px). Remaining anims (walk/hit/dead/defend/item/victory) still T1 AI-gen until artist drops them.

rogue_sdxl.generator: SDXL + jrpg_pixel_style LoRA (v3, with artist rogue) + IP-Adapter (artist ref)

rogue_artist.source: artist (Rogue Base sprite.png from Google Drive)

iron_sword.notes: Separated weapon sprites for fighter iron sword. Compose over body animations.

slash.notes: Slash arc with trail effect. Frames: windup, peak, follow-through.

bronze_sword.notes: Bronze sword weapon sprites for early-game fighter.

flame_sword.notes: Flame sword weapon sprites with fire visual effects.

ice_blade.notes: Ice blade weapon sprites with frost visual effects.

slime.source: artist aseprite — Game graphics - Characters/enemies/SLIME 1.aseprite (Idle + Atk tags)

slime_suburban.source: deterministic HSV hue-shift of artist slime — world 2 (suburban, sky-blue)

slime_steampunk.source: deterministic HSV hue-shift of artist slime — world 3 (steampunk, brass)

slime_industrial.source: deterministic HSV hue-shift of artist slime — world 4 (industrial, rust)

slime_digital.source: deterministic HSV hue-shift of artist slime — world 5 (digital, neon magenta)

slime_abstract.source: deterministic HSV hue-shift of artist slime — world 6 (abstract, monochrome)

bat.source: artist aseprite — Game graphics - Characters/enemies/BAT 1.aseprite (Idle + Atk tags)

goblin.source: artist aseprite — Game graphics - Characters/enemies/Goblin 1 anims.aseprite (Idle + ATK tags; hit/dead remapped off late-ATK crouch-twist frames 6-8 per live playtest 2026-07-01 — dedicated hit/dead frames wanted from artist)

fighter_skeleton_knight.source: gpt-image-1 4-pose contact-sheet anchored to artist goblin reference (tools/regen_monster_artist_style.py). chivalric plate skeleton — Fighter spotlight-duel miniboss (msg 1950)

cleric_survive_target.source: gpt-image-1 4-pose contact-sheet anchored to artist goblin reference (tools/regen_monster_artist_style.py). spectral sustained-pressure target — Cleric spotlight-duel miniboss (msg 1950). Non-HP win: outlast, not defeat.

rogue_lockward.source: gpt-image-1 4-pose contact-sheet anchored to artist goblin reference (tools/regen_monster_artist_style.py). chained treasure-guardian construct — Rogue spotlight-duel miniboss (msg 1950). High-evade + Steal/backstab-solves.

mage_prismatic_construct.source: gpt-image-1 4-pose contact-sheet anchored to artist goblin reference (tools/regen_monster_artist_style.py). crystalline prism construct — Mage spotlight-duel miniboss (msg 1950). Rotating elemental weakness, read-and-exploit-live.

bard_hostile_courtier.source: gpt-image-1 4-pose contact-sheet anchored to artist goblin reference (tools/regen_monster_artist_style.py). aristocratic courtier NPC — Bard spotlight-duel miniboss (msg 1950). Non-HP win: talked-down via status/song thresholds.
